repo_signals: refactor a TypeScript API endpoint and add OpenAPI types

retrieval_query: mlflow model registry experiment tracking retrain trigger data drift deployment gate rollback lineage

validation_smoke.name: code.mlops L3 validation smoke
signals: registry promotion records model version, training run id, and dataset hash
deployment gate blocks a candidate whose offline metric regresses past the threshold
rollback restores the previously serving model version within the SLO

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.mlops diagnosis smoke
signals: served prediction distribution diverges from the training reference (data drift)
a production incident cannot be traced back to a model version or training run
